overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through a sunlit Gothic fantasy city with distinctive teal skies. The character ascends and descends multiple ornate stone staircases, transitioning between covered walkways and open terraces with panoramic views of a distant lake and mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle courtyard with guards and potted plants

events.description: approaching and entering the covered Gothic archway entrance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the sunlit castle courtyard toward a covered stone entrance

notable_agents.action: armored guard in blue plate armor standing at attention near the stairs
dwarf in green clothing walking ahead toward the entrance

entered.detail: light-colored stone castle walls with Gothic arched windows and decorative stonework
ornate stone archway entrance with intricate carved details serving as the main entry
light stone tile flooring with geometric patterns
two guards wearing blue plate armor with helmets and orange plumes
large stone planters containing green shrubs and red flowers

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a bright sunlit castle courtyard with light stone architecture. Geralt walks forward past armored guards standing at attention near the entrance. Large potted plants line the right side as the character approaches an ornate Gothic archway leading into the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered Gothic staircase with ribbed vaulting

events.description: entering covered stairwell, lighting shifts from bright direct sun to diffused interior light
exiting the covered staircase into bright sunlight and open air

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone steps inside the covered stairwell with swords visible on back

notable_agents.action: civilian in colorful blue and orange outfit descending the stairs

entered.detail: intricate Gothic ribbed stone vaulting overhead with geometric patterns
wide stone staircase with steps ascending into the covered structure
carved stone balustrade along the right side of the staircase

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters the covered stone stairwell, leaving the bright courtyard behind. The interior features impressive Gothic vaulted ceilings with diffused natural light filtering through. The character ascends the marble steps, passing a civilian descending in the opposite direction, and approaches the exit back into sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: panoramic terrace overlooking city and mountain lake

events.description: exiting covered structure onto open terrace with expansive view
transitioning from ascending to descending the outdoor staircase

agents.ego_description: walking down the wide outdoor staircase while the camera reveals the panoramic city view

notable_agents.action: civilian in yellow pants walking down the stairs ahead

entered.detail: broad outdoor stone staircase descending the hillside with ornate balustrades
distant view of the fantasy city with spires and red rooftops
scenic view of blue lake surrounded by green mountains under teal sky
stone planters with red flowers lining the staircase

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered stairwell into bright sunlight, the scene opens to a breathtaking panoramic view of a distant city and mountain lake. Geralt descends the wide outdoor staircase, passing flower planters and other pedestrians, with the Gothic castle architecture visible above and the scenic landscape unfolding below.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower terrace with statues approaching enclosed stairway

events.description: reaching the bottom of the stairs and turning toward the next ascent
approaching and entering the enclosed ivy-covered stairway

agents.ego_description: walking along the terrace and beginning to ascend the next staircase

notable_agents.action: civilian in green shirt walking alongside the player character

entered.detail: broad stone terrace with decorative paving at the base of the stairs
tall stone statue of a winged figure on a pedestal
ornate Gothic spires and towers of the castle rising above
dark entrance to the covered stone stairway flanked by walls

segments.scene_description: Geralt reaches the bottom of the panoramic stairs and walks along a stone terrace featuring an impressive angel statue. The character passes other pedestrians while approaching a dark enclosed stairway entrance. The castle spires rise prominently on the right as the segment ends with the character entering the next covered section.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed stone stairway with ivy-covered walls

events.description: entering the shaded enclosed stairway with diffused light

agents.ego_description: climbing the steep enclosed staircase with stone walls on both sides

entered.detail: narrow stone staircase ascending between high walls with steps worn smooth
stone walls covered in green ivy and climbing plants
ornate wooden door with metal studs at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow enclosed stairway flanked by ivy-covered stone walls. The lighting becomes noticeably dimmer and more diffused. Geralt ascends the steep stone steps toward a decorative wooden door visible at the top, with no other characters present in this secluded passage.

events.description: exiting the enclosed stairway back into bright sunlight

agents.ego_description: ascending the final outdoor staircase toward the large angel statue at the top

notable_agents.action: civilian in green clothing ascending the stairs ahead of the player

entered.detail: sunlit stone staircase with carved balustrades ascending the final level
monumental stone statue of a winged figure with outstretched wings on a high pedestal
lush green trees and foliage surrounding the staircase

segments.scene_description: Exiting the enclosed stairway into bright sunlight, Geralt ascends the final outdoor staircase. A monumental angel statue with outstretched wings dominates the view at the top of the stairs. Lush green trees frame the scene as the character follows another civilian up the sunlit stone steps, with the teal sky visible overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit Gothic castle, transitioning from open courtyards and panoramic terraces into secluded stone passages. It begins in a bright courtyard where Geralt passes armored guards and potted plants before moving through an ornate archway into a vaulted stone stairwell with diffused light. As the character emerges from the interior, the scene expands into a breathtaking panoramic view of a distant city and mountain lake, leading the camera down a wide outdoor staircase toward a stone terrace featuring an angel statue. The environment then shifts into a dim, secluded stairway flanked by ivy-covered walls, moving away from the crowds toward a decorative wooden door. Finally, the camera exits the enclosure back into the bright sunlight, ascending a final set of steps toward a monumental winged statue under a vivid teal sky.
